narrative:
West Chester Twp 23 (precinct in Butler County) has 884 registered voters, with 60.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a modest Republican lean of 4.8 percentage points.
